name: klook-cli
description: Klook.com CLI — search activities, trending, and pricing via Browser Bridge

scripts.build: tsc && rm -rf dist/web/public && cp -r src/web/public dist/web/public
scripts.vercel-build: npm run build && npm run vercel:prepare
scripts.vercel:prepare: mkdir -p dist/web/public/reports dist/web/public/exports && (cp -R data/reports/. dist/web/public/reports/ 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp data/exports/*.csv dist/web/public/exports/ 2>/dev/null || true) && node scripts/build-routine-state.mjs
